The '''Citadel of B'omarr''' was a structure built by the [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Monks]] for religious activity and healing. [[Spiker]] was healed at the Citadel.<ref name="The Jabba Tape" />

==Appearances==
*"[[The Jabba Tape]]" {{1st}}
